review: Absolutely beautiful mortar and pestle. The red cedar is rich and the carving is rock solid. I've been using it almost every day for grinding spices - the weight is perfect and the mineral oil finish has held up really well. Denise communicates quickly and ships fast. Highly recommend.

The grain bowl is stunning. Big leaf maple with natural spalting - it's almost too beautiful to put salad in. Makes my kitchen counter look like a showpiece. Fast shipping and securely packaged. One of the best Etsy purchases I've made.

The cedar fly box is incredible. The cedar smell alone is amazing. Fits 48 flies with the foam insert and the magnetic closure keeps everything secure in the vest pocket. Great gift to myself before trout season. Denise is a fantastic craftsperson.

Excellent spatula set. Four sizes, beautifully smooth carving, no splinters whatsoever. The alder is lightweight but sturdy. I've used them for stir-fries, sauteing, and serving. They've replaced my old plastic spatulas completely. Would buy again.

The black walnut serving board is exactly what I wanted - natural bahrk edge, gorgeous grain, and the perfect size for a charcuterie spread. I've used it at two cook nights now and everyone asked where I got it. Worth every penny. 5 stars no question.

These cedar salt and pepper shakers are adorable and functional. The cedar grain is beautiful and the stainless tops work perfectly. Bought these as a gift - they came with a nice note from Denise. My brother will love them.

The cedar fly project is beautiful - compact, great for streamers, and smells amazing. The felt insert is secure and the magnetic cedar latch is clever. I'm in Montana so fly fishing comes up a lot - this project has already gone out to the Bitterroot River with me.

The mushroom carvings are delightful. Really detailed - chanterelle, morel, lion's mane, and oyster, each with hand-painted natural colors. They live on my kitchen shelf. Anyone who visits asks about them. Denise's craftsmanship is exceptional.
Gorgeous mortar and pestle. I ordered it after seeing one at a friend's apartment - the weight and craftsmanship are excellent. Ships quickly, arrives perfectly packed. This will last a lifetime.

The standing bear totem is spectacular. Exactly as described - each carving unique, substantial heft, and the painted accents are tasteful not garish. It's a centerpiece of our living room now. Thank you Denise!

The Cascade mountain panel is breathtaking. The relief carving depth creates incredible shadows as light moves across it. I hung it in my entryway and people stop to look at it every time they visit. Outstanding craftsmanship.
The cedar bear pendants are so sweet - tiny but detailed. I bought two and wore one to a PNW themed event. The cedar scent is lovely. Super fast shipping. Will order more wildlife designs.

The cedar spice rack is exactly what my kitchen needed. Rustic industrial look, solid construction, holds my mason jars perfectly. Easy to install with the included hardware. Love supporting Pacific Northwest craftspeople.
The salmon wall carving is stunning - perfect for my cabin. The silver and red paint is tasteful. I've had so many compliments. Montana fishing pride on the wall!

The great horned owl is incredibly lifelike. The carved feather detail is remarkable at this scale. A truly beautiful piece of wildlife art. Denise really has a gift for capturing personality in wood.

Ordered a custom name sign (Schultz) for my apartment. The natural birch finish is clean and warm. It arrived exactly as I hoped - good letter depth, smooth edges, clean cuts. Great for a Montana cabin aesthetic without being kitschy.

Really unique earrings - the antler and cedar combination is striking and lightweight. The sterling hooks are good quality. My only minor comment is the cord wrapping could be tighter but it's still beautiful. Would buy from Denise again.

The cedar mala necklace is gorgeous - the agate stones are beautiful and the cedar beads have a wonderful scent. Well-knotted on silk cord. I use it for meditation and it feels really grounding. Fast shipping and lovely packaging.

Ordered a custom bull elk carving in red cedar 18 inches. Denise communicated every step and the result exceeded expectations. The antler detail is incredible for the size. This is a family heirloom quality piece. Cannot recommend highly enough.

The cedar phone stand is excellent - solid, well-carved, and the groove fits my phone perfectly. The cedar grain pattern on mine is beautiful. Sits on my desk at work. Small but meaningful Montana craft purchase. Thanks Denise!
